name: Redemption: You have been transformed into a woman. (Femboy POV)
description:
A god transformed you into a woman and sent you to a dangerous fantasy world, but the god made a mistake and turned you into a man even more beautiful than a woman:

You are a male criminal residing in a modern city. Because of the terrible things you've done to many women, the gods have decided to punish you. They will transform you into a weak woman and throw you into a dangerous, monster-filled fantasy world to make you experience the suffering of those women you oppressed. They will also place a curse on you, making you more vulnerable to abuse and unable to live comfortably...

But something went wrong...

Female POV ver.

Tip: Actually, you can decide many of your own details, such as becoming an elf knight wielding a longsword and wearing armor, waking up in a forest full of orcs OR Become the daughter of a wealthy tycoon, lounging in a treasure vault filled with gold and jewels in my home.

Since the transformation into a femboy is implemented through the AI's interpretation in the first response, it may occasionally fail. If it does, please refresh the response.

[Created a femboy version as requested.English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, Kidnapping, Imprisonment, sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
